close_reason: Fixed in commit 15cff010: validation added to Shale.Server, Demux now crashes on missing shard_index, test helpers updated
description:
Transactions without SHARD_INDEX are currently accepted by Log and written to WAL, then silently dropped by Demux. This is data loss.

Fix:
1. Add validation in Shale push handler - reject before WAL write
2. Update test transactions to include shard_index
3. Make Demux crash if it ever sees a transaction without shard_index (should never happen)
title: Reject transactions without shard_index at Log boundary
